gist.headline: Comics in the greenhouse
gist.blurb: ManhwaGen just dropped into the community showcase. Time to generate some webtoons.
gist.summary: Added ManhwaGen, a community-built tool for generating Manhwa-style content, to the apps directory.
gist.impact: Creators can now find and use ManhwaGen directly from the community showcase.
gist.visual_concept: Manhwa refers to Korean comics/webtoons. The scene should feature Polly the bee in a greenhouse setting (referencing GREENHOUSE.md), interacting with comic books or drawing webtoons alongside the monitor robot.
gist.image_prompt: Cozy pixel art scene of the cute bee mascot wearing a tiny artist beret, reading a colorful comic book inside a lush digital greenhouse with code-plants. A chunky pixel robot with a CRT monitor head holds up a freshly drawn comic page. Soft lime green (#ecf874) and pastel peach gradient background. Chunky retro sprites, warm lighting, lo-fi vibes like Stardew Valley. Nostalgic but beautiful, emotionally warm.
